rules.name: Missing_Next_Renewal_Date_for_extension
rules.label: Missing Next Renewal Date for extension

rules.name: Type_Contract_Signed_Manually_Or_Opp_Review_One_Time_Product

rightValue.stringValue: Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review

rules.label: Type = Contract Signed Manually Or Opp Review: One-Time Product’

Flow.description: MIS-7889 - Added Username and Multi-Factor to DDQ MIS-7038 - Auto Cancel DDQ Case MIS-7648 Autorize DocuSign field logic adjustment :Assign Deal Desk New Case Fields MIS-7621 MIS-7162 mis-6788 child case description

dynamicChoiceSets.name: Renewal_Quote_Link_Lookup_Filter
dynamicChoiceSets.filterLogic: 1 And 2 AND ( 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR 7)

Flow.label: Case - Sc - Create a Case

fields.name: Billing_Subtype_Mandatory
fields.fieldText: Please complete the case sub-type

fields.name: Case_Failed
fields.fieldText:
There was a problem creating the case - please contact MIS


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: Help_Text_For_Type
fields.fieldText:
Deal Desk: help with opp, quote, contract edits, redlines, legal, finance, etc.


Sales Ops: Salesforce Hygiene, Accounts, Contacts, Meetings, Reports, Dashboards, etc.

fields.name: Wrong_Type_For_GTM
fields.fieldText:
These case types cannot be submitted by GTM:

1. Contract Signed Manually

2. Opp Review: One-Time Product


Please choose a different case type.

fields.name: Select_Account_Error
fields.fieldText: You must add a related record for Extension case

validationRule.errorMessage: Description is too long, please shorten your text

fields.name: Is_it_a_portal_or_an_attachment
fields.fieldText: Is it a portal or an attachment?

fields.name: Did_we_already_complete_a_DDQ_for_this_client_in_the_past
fields.fieldText: Did we already complete a DDQ for this client in the past?

fields.name: Did_we_try_to_send_the_SECURITY_KIT
fields.fieldText: Did we try to send the SECURITY KIT?

fields.name: Do_we_have_a_signed_NDA_in_place_DealDesk
fields.fieldText: Do we have a signed NDA in place?

fields.name: Similarweb_Security_Kit
fields.helpText: Public SMWB docs you can share with your Customer (e.g. SOC 3)

fields.name: Username
fields.helpText: You must send the Password and additional login information directly to the Legal email address

fields.name: MultiFactorAuthenticationHelpText
fields.fieldText: Please provide the login information (including Password) directly to the Legal email address﻿

fields.name: Missing_Quote_Error
fields.fieldText:
For Extension type Temporary Extension - you must open the case from a Quote or Opportunity.

Please go back and reopen the case from a relevant record.

value.stringValue: Please populate a Quote related to the case first
Please populate a Quote related to the case first
File Upload - Maximum file size: 2 GB

fields.name: Error_Account_must_have_next_renewal_date
fields.fieldText: For the selected extension type, the account must have Next Renewal Date Value

fields.name: Error_Screen
fields.fieldText:
There was a problem with the case creation with RT - please contact MIS support


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

value.stringValue: File Upload - Maximum file size: 2 GB

fields.name: Salesops_VR_Missing_Meetings
fields.fieldText: For Meeting Process sub type , please add the relevant meeting to the case

fields.name: Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
Your case was created successfully

Link to Case

subflows.description: For adding all related records when the user added manually only part of them - in cases the case was not opened from a specific record
subflows.name: Case_AL_Prefill_Related_Records_For_Manually_Added_Related_Records
subflows.label: Case - AL - Prefill Related Records - For Manually Added Related Records

textTemplates.name: Email_Template_DealDesk
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!NewCaseVar.Requester__r.FirstName},


Thank you for reaching out to Deal Desk! Your case was opened successfully.


The case number is????


We’ll take a look at your case shortly and will get back to you soon. If you have any further questions, please enter the case number in Salesforce and start chatting with us there!


Best Regards,


The Deal Desk Team
